text:

> +bin/darktable-cli

>   %%DATADIR%%/darktable.gtkrc
>   %%DATADIR%%/gdb_commands
> +%%DATADIR%%/js/.DS_Store

This guy shouldn't be there. Please remove it before install.

Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
